我不常看消息，见谅一下，Sorry      ξ( ✿＞◡❛)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwGQiEylNKTJRmhYKApXs7Br5MfJp1OXS85lQ4SI+1x+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2c3bc80a47aa40e58615f286bd4011f8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796266&x-signature=8BtoayXRqCBtbLVdMuzvieFOS8c%3D","user_id":"2572497615849323","user_name":"月亮才不打烊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2572497615849323","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589406355220335641","book_info":{"abstract":"［群像］［爆笑］［国运］［无限流］［反套路］［登神之路］
睁开眼，任非发现自己重生了。
这一世，他没有选择觉醒3S级天赋［欺诈权柄］，只因他知道除财神外，其他登神途径都是一场骗局！
开局任非就找国家打钱，一百亿！
而随着一百亿到账，他也顺利觉醒5S级天赋［散财童子］。
天赋［散财童子］具备两个效果。
“散财”和“来财”。
“散财”：只要有钱，任非就可以在规则怪谈里横行无忌，穿梭副本、更改规则、获得诡异力量等等。
“来财”：进入副本后，副本中的任何物品都将被明码标价，而任非拥有售卖这些物品的权利。
然后。
搞笑的一幕发生了。
一众诡异看着被任非搬空、空空如也的副本，集体沉默……
这还没完。
任非又穿梭进入其他天选者的副本空间，再次收刮一遍。
其他天选者：“？？？”
副本的诡异：“？？？”
诡异崩溃了！
夭寿啦！
你是一点不当人啊！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/79cf3851215f0c0c85856d38e945db20","author":"奈何情深","author_id":"","book_id":"7589406355220335641","book_name":"规则怪谈：开局觉醒5S级天赋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403028","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5644人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589406359313990169","read_count":"5644","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"255617"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"115","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,无女主,开局,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f4b978d63e680fe96bdd0e7a4a627b03~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450729&x-signature=R4OvgRq0xJ2%2Fr6bGD0KEAgfnqJQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2862769372400028","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319520904661F46C78F7EF1291D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6179},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7599160130883601176","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"奈何依旧稳得一批，玩梗爽、剧情飞、主角绝：梗贴合不生硬，主角鲜活讨喜自带笑点。不管遇啥事儿都能玩出花来，治愈又解压。这才是爽文该有的样子，玩梗爽到笑，剧情爽到燃！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769322782,"group_id":"7589406355220335641","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2652459610932216"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589406355220335641","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19610,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7596361973838414616","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从初代《规则怪谈》到如今的续作，这套书始终在“惊悚逃生”与“沙雕整活”的边界上反复横跳。
它最让人欲罢不能的，是主角从苏晓到任非一脉相承的“反套路”操作。当其他怪谈文还在靠运气和恐惧渲染氛围时，这里的主角却把规则玩成了脱口秀，把逃生现场变成了一边卖家具赚得盆满钵满，一边把怪物戏耍到怀疑人生。这种“智商在线+骚操作拉满”的设定，真的是太爽了(ღ˘⌣˘ღ)
既满足读者对“熟悉味道”的期待，也在重复中寻找新的突破。无论如何，只要任非还在怪谈里继续整活，只要弹幕里还飘着“鹅鹅鹅”的笑声，这套书依然能在“沙雕”与“惊悚”之间，找到属于它的独特节奏。。。[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742667297EF1291D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227596361973838414616%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589406355220335641%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":112,"s":109,"text":"脱口秀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742667297EF1291D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227596361973838414616%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589406355220335641%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%84%B1%E5%8F%A3%E7%A7%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768669065,"group_id":"7589406355220335641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"柔爱了，柔恨了，柔忘了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz4/tuv0H0pJYPI2xGpxt3u6k2G36aJ6FtKF4ifJapt0","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e15164e11de04e1382cd2e8dce8ebecf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797188&x-signature=n0SLj8IZIHqQD%2B3GjsVz4938FZY%3D","user_id":"2652459610932216","user_name":"ou@r"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2652459610932216","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_
